Pioneering Clean Power

Next-Gen Transformer Engineering

ROBOART Transformers designs and manufactures class-leading Control, Step Down, Isolation, and Three Phase Transformers for missions where failure is never an option.

Manufacturing Excellence

Heavy Industrial Power Plants

Built inside our state-of-the-art Faridabad facility, every ROBOART Transformer is engineered with high-efficiency copper/aluminum windings, ensuring absolute isolation and safe electrical transfer for critical industrial loads.

ISO 9001 & CE Certified

Standardized designs complying with international electrical security requirements.

High Efficiency & Low Losses

Precision-wound copper and aluminum coils reducing core heat and increasing longevity.

Total Electrical Isolation

Advanced isolation design to reduce electrical noise, interference, and ensure equipment life.

12+ Years
500+ MW
0 ms

Ready to Integrate ROBOART Transformers?

Connect instantly with our heavy manufacturing engineers to draft single-line diagrams, input isolations, and custom transformer specifications.
